title: Best offer slightly above budget
description: The only technically valid offer is €30 above the buyer's budget, requiring a human decision on whether to accept the overage for faster delivery.

expected_escalation.reason: Best technically valid offer is €30 above budget
expected_escalation.question_for_human: Do you approve exceeding the budget by €30 for faster delivery?

title: Warranty below minimum requirement
description: A seller offers an attractive price but the warranty is only 6 months, below the buyer's 1-year minimum requirement.

expected_escalation.reason: Lowest-price offer has only 6 months warranty, below the required 1 year minimum
expected_escalation.question_for_human: Do you accept a 6-month warranty in exchange for a significantly lower price?

title: Missing power draw specification
description: A seller cannot confirm the power draw of a candidate GPU, leaving a key technical constraint unresolved.

expected_escalation.reason: Power draw specification for Vendor A's RTX 4070 Ti could not be confirmed
expected_escalation.question_for_human: Should we proceed with Vendor A pending confirmation of power draw, or exclude this offer?

title: Seller requests sensitive information
description: A seller asks for the buyer's banking credentials before confirming an order, triggering a high-risk signal.

expected_escalation.reason: Vendor D requested sensitive banking information before confirming the order
expected_escalation.question_for_human: Vendor D requested banking details before confirmation - should this seller be excluded from consideration?

title: Two offers very close in overall value
description: Vendor B and Vendor C both pass technical validation with very similar price, delivery, and warranty profiles, requiring human tie-breaking.

expected_escalation.reason: Vendor B and Vendor C offers are very close in overall score (92 vs 88)
expected_escalation.question_for_human: Both Vendor B and Vendor C offers are strong - confirm Vendor B (better warranty and delivery) as the recommended supplier?
